summary: The chapter depicts a powerful master demonstrating his immense strength while agreeing to train the Knights of Kion and Pnis in the Heavenly Demon Art. Afterward, the protagonist, Mr. Kang, meets with his team to discuss a crucial professional contract and promises to elevate them to 'Ranker-level' status through intensive training within two months. The chapter concludes with Kang departing for a difficult mission in Senu, leaving his disciples behind to grapple with the intensity of their upcoming preparation.
key_moments: The Gatekeeper forces a knight to acknowledge his superior power through an overwhelming aura display.
The master agrees to teach his secret techniques to the knights of Kion and Pnis.
Mr. Kang holds a meeting to finalize a professional debut contract and sets a high-stakes training goal for his team.
